# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the **latest release** and the **main** branch of each repository are supported for security fixes.

Agents Arena is an actively developed hobby/research project. There is no formal long-term support (LTS) policy. Older releases and branches may not receive patches.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, please report it responsibly:

1. **Preferred:** Open a private [GitHub security advisory](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing-information-about-vulnerabilities) on the relevant repository under the [agents-arena](https://github.com/agents-arena) organization.
2. **Alternatively:** Contact the maintainer via the GitHub profile [https://github.com/khaledbakeer](https://github.com/khaledbakeer) or on X [https://x.com/0xBakeer](https://x.com/0xBakeer).

Please include enough detail to reproduce the issue (affected repo, commit or version, steps, and impact). Do not open a public issue for unfixed vulnerabilities.

We will acknowledge reports as promptly as we can and work with you on a fix. Thank you for helping keep Agents Arena safe for everyone who uses it.
